name: Odd-Eyes Gravity Dragon
name_jp: オッドアイズ・グラビティ・ドラゴン
desc: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Odd-Eyes Advent". When this card is Special Summoned: You can return all Spells and Traps your opponent controls to the hand. Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to this effect's activation. You can only use this effect of "Odd-Eyes Gravity Dragon" once per turn. Your opponent must pay 500 LP to activate card effects.
mnst_eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Odd-Eyes Advent". When this card is Special Summoned: You can return all Spells and Traps your opponent controls to the hand. Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to this effect's activation. You can only use this effect of "Odd-Eyes Gravity Dragon" once per turn. Your opponent must pay 500 LP to activate card effects.
eff: You can Ritual Summon this card with "Odd-Eyes Advent". When this card is Special Summoned: You can return all Spells and Traps your opponent controls to the hand. Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to this effect's activation. You can only use this effect of "Odd-Eyes Gravity Dragon" once per turn. Your opponent must pay 500 LP to activate card effects.

eff_types: Summoning condition, Trigger, Condition, Condition, Continuous
action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
Must pay cost to activate cards or effects
mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
life_points: Your opponent pays Life Points for cost
